'''ngorataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ktetic|ktetic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ktetic|ktetic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngorataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoratithi|ngoratithi]] || [[word:ngoratiji|ngoratiji]] || [[word:ngoratishi|ngoratishi]] || [[word:ngoratiki|ngoratiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoratuthuthu|ngoratuthuthu]] || [[word:ngoratujuju|ngoratujuju]] || [[word:ngoratushushu|ngoratushushu]] || [[word:ngoratukuku|ngoratukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoratuthu|ngoratuthu]] || [[word:ngoratuju|ngoratuju]] || [[word:ngoratushu|ngoratushu]] || [[word:ngoratuku|ngoratuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoratufthuf|ngoratufthuf]] || [[word:ngoratufjuf|ngoratufjuf]] || [[word:ngoratufshuf|ngoratufshuf]] || [[word:ngoratufkuf|ngoratufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoratethe|ngoratethe]] || [[word:ngorateje|ngorateje]] || [[word:ngorateshe|ngorateshe]] || [[word:ngorateke|ngorateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoratothotho|ngoratothotho]] || [[word:ngoratojojo|ngoratojojo]] || [[word:ngoratoshosho|ngoratoshosho]] || [[word:ngoratokoko|ngoratokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoratotho|ngoratotho]] || [[word:ngoratojo|ngoratojo]] || [[word:ngoratosho|ngoratosho]] || [[word:ngoratoko|ngoratoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoratofthof|ngoratofthof]] || [[word:ngoratofjof|ngoratofjof]] || [[word:ngoratofshof|ngoratofshof]] || [[word:ngoratofkof|ngoratofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoratĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoratĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoratĂŠthĂŠ|ngoratĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoratĂŠjĂŠ|ngoratĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoratĂŠshĂŠ|ngoratĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoratĂŠkĂŠ|ngoratĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoratathatha|ngoratathatha]] || [[word:ngoratajaja|ngoratajaja]] || [[word:ngoratashasha|ngoratashasha]] || [[word:ngoratakaka|ngoratakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoratatha|ngoratatha]] || [[word:ngorataja|ngorataja]] || [[word:ngoratasha|ngoratasha]] || [[word:ngorataka|ngorataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoratafthaf|ngoratafthaf]] || [[word:ngoratafjaf|ngoratafjaf]] || [[word:ngoratafshaf|ngoratafshaf]] || [[word:ngoratafkaf|ngoratafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngoratasha|ngoratasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoratshĂ«asha|ngoratshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoratroasha|ngoratroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoratmuasha|ngoratmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoratyaasha|ngoratyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoratnkshĂ«asha|gongoratnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoratnkroasha|gongoratnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoratnkmuasha|gongoratnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoratnkyaasha|gongoratnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngoraratasha|ngoraratasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoraratshĂ«asha|ngoraratshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoraratroasha|ngoraratroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoraratmuasha|ngoraratmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoraratyaasha|ngoraratyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoraratnkshĂ«asha|gongoraratnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoraratnkroasha|gongoraratnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoraratnkmuasha|gongoraratnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoraratnkyaasha|gongoraratnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngerĂŠtasha|ngerĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngerĂŠtshĂ«asha|ngerĂŠtshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngerĂŠtroasha|ngerĂŠtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngerĂŠtmuasha|ngerĂŠtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngerĂŠtyaasha|ngerĂŠtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongerĂŠtnkshĂ«asha|gongerĂŠtnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongerĂŠtnkroasha|gongerĂŠtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongerĂŠtnkmuasha|gongerĂŠtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongerĂŠtnkyaasha|gongerĂŠtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngorfatasha|ngorfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngorfatshĂ«asha|ngorfatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngorfatroasha|ngorfatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngorfatmuasha|ngorfatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngorfatyaasha|ngorfatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongorfatnkshĂ«asha|gongorfatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongorfatnkroasha|gongorfatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongorfatnkmuasha|gongorfatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongorfatnkyaasha|gongorfatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
